summary_en: 22,300 shares acquired (0.22% of S/O) for ¥32.29M in May 1–29, 2026 via open-market and ToSTNeT-3 methods. Cumulative to date under Feb 12, 2026 board authorization (150,000-share / ¥30M limit through Dec 31, 2026): 22,300 shares / ¥32.29M (14.9% of share limit, 10.8% of yen limit consumed).
title_en: Notice of status of acquisition of treasury shares
translation_en_brief: Boutiques Inc. filed a progress report on May 29, 2026 regarding treasury share acquisitions authorized by the board on February 12, 2026. During the period May 1–29, 2026, the company acquired 22,300 ordinary shares for a total of ¥32,293,100 via market purchases on the Tokyo Stock Exchange using two methods: traded-contract transactions and ToSTNeT-3 (self-tender off-exchange trading). The board authorized acquisition of up to 150,000 shares (1.5% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for a maximum of ¥300 million through December 31, 2026. As of May 29, 2026, cumulative acquisitions under this authorization amount to 22,300 shares for ¥32,293,100, representing approximately 14.9% of the authorized share count and 10.8% of the authorized yen limit.
